title: Outer Space Objects
text:
library(tidyverse)
  tuesdata <- tidytuesdayR::tt_load('2024-04-23')
  outer_space_objects <- tuesdata$outer_space_objects
  
  object_summary <- outer_space_objects %>%
  group_by(Year) %>%
  summarize(total_objects = sum(num_objects, na.rm = TRUE))
  
  ggplot(data = object_summary, 
         aes(x = Year, y = total_objects)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "purple") +
  labs(
    title = "Number of Objects Launched into Outer Space by Year",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of Objects"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()








The number of objects launched into space has sky rocketed! The sharp increase in the 2010’s is out of this world.

title: M1ke H0uk
text:
This is the website of Michael Houk. Here is a list of some of my key dentities and qualities, though it is by no means exhaustive: Brother, Curious, Student, Friend, Athlete, Awake, Myself?, Thinker, Attached.
I study economics and engineering. I play football. I like hard work.

title: World’s Fairs
text:
library(tidyverse)
  tuesdata <- tidytuesdayR::tt_load('2024-08-13')
  worlds_fairs <- tuesdata$worlds_fairs
  ggplot(data = worlds_fairs, 
         aes(x = start_year, y = visitors, color = attending_countries)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "World's Fairs: Year vs Visitors",
       x = "Year",
       y = "Number of Visitors",
       color = "Attending Countries") +
  theme_minimal()

title: World’s Fairs
section: World’s Fairs visitor numbers are up since 1850! Also, the color gradient show the increase in the number of countries who attend the World’s Fair.
text: World’s Fairs visitor numbers are up since 1850! Also, the color gradient show the increase in the number of countries who attend the World’s Fair.

title: About
text:
Junior at Claremont McKenna College from San Diego, CA.

This is my collection of data visualizations. Click through my projects if you want your mind blown.
